componentInstanceProperties.name: filter
componentInstanceProperties.value: Clean_Domain__c=:dynamicParam1 AND Email_address_domain_type__c like '%Company%' AND IsConverted = False

componentInstanceProperties.name: filter
componentInstanceProperties.value: Email_address_domain_type__c like '%Company%' AND ((Email_Domain__c=:dynamicParam1 AND Email_Domain__c!=Null) OR (Website_Domain__c=:dynamicParam2 AND Website_Domain__c!=Null))

visibilityRule.booleanFilter: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7
